read_file.description: Read a file's contents. Returns the file text, or an error string if the file is missing.

edit_file.description: Replace exact-string `old_string` with `new_string` in the file at `path`. `old_string` must appear in the file VERBATIM exactly once. Returns 'ok: ...' on success or 'error: ...' on failure (try reading the file again if old_string isn't found).

run_tests.description: Run a test file to verify your fix. Returns {exit_code, stdout, stderr}. The 'test' arg is a path (relative to the working directory) to a runnable test file; it is run with a fixed interpreter, no shell.

done.description: Signal that the task is complete. Carries a one-line summary of what was fixed.
